title: Minimum Operations to Make a Special Number
titleCn: 生成特殊数字的最少操作

testcases.input: num = "2245047" Output: 2 Explanation: Delete digits num[5] and num[6]. The resulting number is "22450" which is special since it is divisible by 25. It can be shown that 2 is the minimum number of operations required to get a special number.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Delete digits num[5] and num[6]. The resulting number is "22450" which is special since it is divisible by 25. It can be shown that 2 is the minimum number of operations required to get a special number.

testcases.input: num = "2908305" Output: 3 Explanation: Delete digits num[3], num[4], and num[6]. The resulting number is "2900" which is special since it is divisible by 25. It can be shown that 3 is the minimum number of operations required to get a special number.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Delete digits num[3], num[4], and num[6]. The resulting number is "2900" which is special since it is divisible by 25. It can be shown that 3 is the minimum number of operations required to get a special number.

testcases.input: num = "10" Output: 1 Explanation: Delete digit num[0]. The resulting number is "0" which is special since it is divisible by 25. It can be shown that 1 is the minimum number of operations required to get a special number.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Delete digit num[0]. The resulting number is "0" which is special since it is divisible by 25. It can be shown that 1 is the minimum number of operations required to get a special number.
